active_planning_focus: Lock v0.2.0 public launch planning state.
last_planning_summary: The v0.2.0 public launch planning state uses the existing accepted Project Intent Compiler differentiation plan. The launch scope includes README public surface cleanup, README.ko sync, SECURITY.md and SECURITY.ko.md, v0.2.0 release draft, demo verification, concise README and command docs, normalized examples, benchmark fixtures, target export conformance, ni-start dogfood transcript, install/build hardening, contribution boundary, and launch checklist. The CLI readiness gate reports READY with no blockers.
